The previous plan resulted in a large displacement from the origin (0,0) and did not make progress toward the targets. The new plan starts by rotating 45 degrees and moving 1 meter. If a target is ahead, it rotates 45 degrees and moves 1 meter again. If no target is ahead, it requests a new plan from the LLM. If none of the above conditions are met, it also requests a new plan from the LLM.
Plans.verifier_output: fail: face_target uses move_spot; go_to_target lacks concrete numeric rotate/move actions unless already at_goal; It repeats a failed action pattern described in feedback.
